name: Chrome Tab Sweeper
description: Build or operate a macOS menu-bar Chrome tab control surface that lists overloaded browser tabs, groups them by domain or task, and closes explicit selected tab batches with a safe review step.
short_description: A Mac menu-bar tab control surface for understanding overloaded Chrome windows and closing selected tab piles in one shot.
default_prompt: Use $chrome-tab-sweeper to build a macOS menu-bar utility that lists Chrome tabs, groups the mess by domain, and closes explicit selected tab batches safely.
audience: People with too many Chrome tabs open
detail_lines: Lists every Chrome window and tab from a top-bar control surface.
Groups the overload by domain so the mess becomes readable fast.
Closes only explicit tab tokens, making one-shot cleanup deliberate instead of scary.
